creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 213628
Patch to 0.8.1

Update to 0.8.1

Changelog: https://herbstluftwm.org/news.html
- the frame index e refers to the first empty frame
- new setting hide_covered_windows to improve the appearance when used with a compositor
- keybind now checks that the bound command exists
- bug fixes
